scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run merge && npm run registry && npm run build-provider && npm run gensdk
scripts.gensdk: npm run gen && npm run fix-version && npm run build-sdk
scripts.gen: cd provider && pulumi package gen-sdk schema.json --language nodejs --out ../sdk
scripts.fix-version: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const file = './sdk/nodejs/package.json'; const data = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8').replace('\"${VERSION}\"', '\"0.0.1\"'); fs.writeFileSync(file, data);"
scripts.build-sdk: cd sdk/nodejs && npm install && npm run build
